name: Shelf
description: A well-loved bookcase — spines of every height shoulder together, one always leaning, re-shelved by each redraw.

code.style: --book1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( border-bottom: calc(30px / @Y) solid rgba(90, 70, 50, 0.45); box-sizing: border-box; /* the third spine is the second one's shadow, so the pair shares a series color */ --book2: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 12%; width: 18%; bottom: 0; height: @rand(58%, 84%); background: var(--book1); box-shadow: inset 0 calc(-60px / @Y) 0 rgba(255, 244, 220, 0.35); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 36%; width: 18%; bottom: 0; height: @rand(52%, 78%); background: @var(--book2); box-shadow: calc(196px / @Y) calc(@r(-90, -20) * 1px / @Y) 0 @var(--book2), inset 0 calc(-44px / @Y) 0 rgba(30, 24, 18, 0.25); transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.3) { :after { transform: rotate(@rand(-8deg, -4deg)); transform-origin: 100% 100%; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
